packaging_rules.rule: Hits over roughly £4–£5 should normally be top-loaded
packaging_rules.notes: Toploaders are a core trust signal for higher-value items.

packaging_rules.rule: Orders usually ship in padded envelopes
packaging_rules.notes: Padded envelopes are the default shipping method.

packaging_rules.rule: Team bags and SaveRoom 'Seal of Approval' stickers are part of the brand experience
packaging_rules.notes: Brand touchpoint. Builds recognition and trust.

shipping_standards.standard: All items must be adequately protected for transit
shipping_standards.notes: Damaged items destroy trust and create unnecessary hassle.

shipping_standards.standard: Packaging should reflect the value of the contents
shipping_standards.notes: Higher-value items get better packaging. This is a trust signal.

stream_operations.reason: Too many bundle types slow streams down and confuse viewers.

stream_operations.rule: Stream pacing should maintain energy without rushing
stream_operations.reason: Rushed streams feel transactional. Community-first means taking time.

red_lines.rule: Never ship damaged or poorly packaged items
red_lines.reason: Packaging quality is a core trust signal. Damaged items destroy community trust.

red_lines.rule: Never use gambling mechanics or manipulative scarcity
red_lines.reason: Brand commitment to fairness. These tactics damage community trust.
